summary: Complete testing of AI Village: The Echoes new features - Unity Offload support, Mode Selection with 3 modes, Open Maps in Story Mode, and Jobs Hub. All 7 backend tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend testing confirmed all features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 422 when player_id/character_id not found in localStorage - expected behavior but could improve error message

passed_tests: GET /api/unity/config - Returns Unity server configuration with platforms, features, sync intervals
GET /api/unity/downloads - Returns download links for Windows, macOS, Linux with version and changelog
GET /api/jobs/catalog - Returns job catalog with 21 jobs across 5+ categories
GET /api/locations - Returns all 7 locations (village_square, oracle_sanctum, the_forge, ancient_library, wanderers_rest, shadow_grove, watchtower)
API health check - All endpoints responding
frontend_tests_passed: Homepage loads with 'Enter The Echoes' button
Mode Selection page shows 3 game modes: Story Mode, First Person 3D, Unity 3D
Story Mode card shows 'AI Narrator' and 'All Maps Open' badges
First Person 3D card shows 'Web 3D' and 'D-Pad' badges
Unity Offload page loads with hero section, connection status, download links, features
Unity Offload shows Windows, macOS, Linux download links
Unity Offload shows 4 features: High-Fidelity Graphics, Seamless Sync, Controller Support, Combat System
Village Explorer (Story Mode) shows all locations as accessible
Village Explorer shows 'New' badges for unvisited locations
Village Explorer has chat input with quick actions (meditate, explore, gather, commune)
Jobs Hub shows economy stats (VE$ Distributed, Eco Points, Tasks Completed, Active Workers)
Jobs Hub shows Job Catalog with 21 jobs across categories (Task Work, AI Training, Commerce, etc.)
Jobs Hub job detail modal shows hourly rate, eco points, AI benefit, and Enroll button
critical_code_review_comments: Unity router correctly implements /api/unity/config and /api/unity/downloads endpoints
Unity session management with token generation and cross-platform sync support
ModeSelection.jsx correctly shows 3 mode cards with appropriate badges and navigation
UnityOffload.jsx has complete UI with connection status, download links, features section, and advanced settings
VillageExplorer.jsx has ALL_LOCATIONS_OPEN = true, allowing full exploration in Story Mode
JobsHub.jsx shows job catalog with categories, economy stats, and enrollment functionality

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 passed, 1 skipped - session test requires valid user/character)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, all features functional)

seed_data_creation: Test characters created during testing: TestVillageHero, Sirix_Test_Hero
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Unity Offload page at /unity with connection status, download links (Windows/macOS/Linux), and features section. Unity WebSocket connection is MOCKED in frontend. 2) Mode Selection at /select-mode shows 3 modes: Story Mode, First Person 3D, Unity 3D. 3) Village Explorer at /village has ALL_LOCATIONS_OPEN = true - all 7 locations accessible without progression requirements. 4) Jobs Hub at /jobs shows 21 jobs across categories with enrollment functionality.

mocked_apis.Unity WebSocket: Connection simulation in UnityOffload.jsx - actual Unity client not available
mocked_apis.Unity Session: POST /api/unity/session works but requires valid player_id and character_id from localStorage
